title: Chess Nebula
desc: Chess Nebula is a welcoming forest destination centered around the game of chess. Visitors can play matches in a calm, friendly setting suited for both beginners and experienced players. It offers a relaxed space to learn, practice, and enjoy the game among others who share the same interest.

title: Velvet Bohème
desc: Lose yourself in Velvet Bohème, a two-week boho festival blending shopping, art, music, and literature in Second Life. Shop, soak up the atmosphere, or catch a live singer or DJ from partner venues Altitude and Sanctum. Open April 4 to 18, 2026.

title: Grand Harbor Isle
desc: Grand Harbor Isle is a scenic, car-free coastal destination set in Lake Serene. Designed for exploration and relaxation, the island features a detailed waterfront town, forest trails, waterfalls, beaches, and elevated viewpoints throughout. Visitors can explore by foot, bike, or horse, with rezers available across the region. The town includes a mix of storefronts, apartments, and rental homes, along with the Grand Harbor Hotel for short stays. A central Welcome Center provides information on rentals, hotel availability, and key landmarks. Grand Harbor Isle is ideal for photography, casual exploration, and social visits. No roleplay is required, though light roleplay is welcome.

title: Etopia Earth Day Celebrations AIDFZyTo
desc: To help celebrate Earth Day for 2026, you're invited to explore, engage, and enjoy exhibits, activities, and discussions related to the theme "Our power, Our Planet". From wetlands exploration to bike trails, train rides to meditation spots, conversations and resources to cafes and gondola rides. Celebrations will kick off on 17 April and close with an Earth Day dance on 23 April at Etopia in Second Life.

title: L'aEvo
desc: L'aEvo is a quiet garden retreat set among trees and gentle paths. Visitors can relax by the water, gather around a fire pit, or enjoy game tables for casual play and conversation. The space invites small groups seeking calm, connection, and a romantic outdoor setting.

title: CHECK POINT
desc: Check Point is an international club and social hub known for its relaxed atmosphere and wide mix of music, including rock, pop, house, soul, and techno. Guests can dance, chat, and unwind with DJs from across Europe in a welcoming setting. CHECK POINT der ultimative Treffpunkt für Leute die ein angenehmes Ambiente und Musik in allen Facetten lieben.

title: Velvet Bohème idkytevs
desc: Lose yourself in Velvet Bohème, a two-week boho festival blending shopping, art, music, and literature in Second Life. Shop, soak up the atmosphere, or catch a live singer or DJ from partner venues Altitude and Sanctum. Open April 4 to 18, 2026.

title: Zoo-Palooza 6 - Hamtopia
desc: The Bellisseria Animal Sanctuary presents Hamtopia! Hamtopia is an innovative, eco-sustainable zoo designed to revolutionize the way humans interact with animals and nature in the future. Set within a sprawling bio-atmosphere that mimics various global ecosystems. The event opens on Saturday, May 2nd, 2026, and runs until Saturday, May 30th, 2026.

title: Norway Racing Festival yrTsIZhi
desc: Norway Racing Festival is a multi-day virtual motorsport event hosted in Second Life, bringing together racing enthusiasts, drivers, performers, and creators from around the world. The festival features races, drift shows, live performances, contests, and community-driven activities, all designed to create an immersive and exciting motorsport experience. The event runs from March 16th through the grand finale on the 22nd. Learn more at nrfevent.com

title: Vanity Poses
desc: Vanity Poses offers a wide range of high-quality single and couple poses for photos, profiles, and creative shoots. Styles range from casual to formal and intimate, with new releases added weekly.

title: SONANCE
desc: Established in 2023, SONANCE is a nightclub complex and music collective in Second Life, embracing underground culture while curating immersive events and forward-thinking lineups every week. No rules. No lights. Only instinct.

title: Ashram de Kuan Yin
desc: Kuan Yin's Ashram is a living space of silence, created to welcome those who feel the call to slow down, breathe, and listen to their own soul. Inspired by the compassionate energy of Kuan Yin, this ashram does not impose paths, practices, or beliefs. Here, each being is respected in their own rhythm, in their own time, and in their unique way of feeling. The environment fosters presence, gentleness, and inner listening, a gentle invitation to the peace that already dwells within you.

title: Steel Havoc MC & Club
desc: Steel Havoc MC & Club brings a gritty biker club atmosphere with pulsing lights and a focus on music and crowd energy. Expect sets spanning many genres, including rock, with a space built for loud nights, social connection, and high-energy events.

title: Night Wish Shores
desc: Night Wish Shores calls to all dreamers. A quiet ribbon of moonlit sand where wishes rise like fireflies. Here, the waves murmur secrets, the reeds hum soft lullabies, and the night itself leans close, inviting you to listen.

title: Isle Of Cernunnos Aquatic Life
desc: Isle of Cernunnos Aquatic Life is an adult coastal escape with forests, reefs, and quiet beaches. Visitors can explore above and below the water, relax in scenic hangout spots, or enjoy private floating and underwater rentals. It offers space for roleplay, connection, and peaceful downtime.

title: Whispering Event
desc: Whispering Event is a monthly shopping event open from the 1st to the 22nd of each month, featuring rotating exclusives across fashion, tattoos, and decor. Set in a gothic-inspired space with modern touches, it offers a curated marketplace for creators and shoppers to connect each round.

title: GUY Magazine PRIDE in Space 2026 DoIZENVX
desc: GUY Magazine PRIDE in Space 2026 is this year’s installment of GUY Magazine’s annual Pride festival, hosted at The Portal. It features shopping, games, carnival rides, live acts, and parties throughout June, with an opening celebration on May 31 and events like live dance shows and a K-pop concert.

title: Bellisseria Birthday Bash QxuptISy
desc: Bellisseria Birthday Bash brings a week-long celebration to the Fairgrounds with tours, live DJs, and collectible passport stamps. Visitors can explore by air, sea, and land, take part in driving and flying challenges, and join community ceremonies from April 14–20. Learn more at gazetteorg.wordpress.com

title: AISM Event 2026
desc: From May 15th to May 30th, 2026, step into a world of music, entertainment, and solidarity with AISM 2026! An exceptional event, a marathon of entertainment in Second Life, entirely dedicated to supporting AISM in its fight against multiple sclerosis. Get ready for hours of fun, wild dances, and breathtaking performances! Visit and experience unforgettable moments, all for a noble cause.

title: The Studio Event
desc: The Studio is a shopping event from Juniper Events and Space Cadet. At The Studio, you will find the latest poses, props, backdrops, and lighting kits to make your avatar shine! The event runs from May 1st to 11th. Learn more at juniperevents.net

title: Melanoma Awareness Gallery
desc: May is Melanoma Awareness Month, and the Melanoma Awareness Gallery is an educational event committed to increasing awareness of melanoma prevention and early detection. Running May 1 to May 31, 2026, it features updated art photography, a Journey of Hope, and spaces to learn, reflect, and honor survivors and those lost.

title: Bid the Lindens Bald bUOYCQwW
desc: Bid the Lindens & Moles Bald returns for its 10th annual showdown in support of Relay For Life in Second Life. Teams of Lindens and Moles literally put their hair on the line. Residents vote with their donations: the teams that raise the most keep their locks, while the team that raises the least will go bald until the next birthday celebrations. Voting opens during RelayStock on April 10 and runs through April 15, culminating in the always-entertaining Haircut Party from 12:00–2:30 PM SLT, with the clippers coming out at 2:15 PM SLT. Learn more at relayrockers.org/bidthelindensbald

title: VWBPE 2026 Conference BzfnytvE
desc: The Virtual Worlds Best Practices in Education Conference runs March 19–21, 2026. This open conference is organized by educators to showcase learning, tools, and methods for virtual environments. Join the event for three days of lectures, workshops, discussions, games, and more - including a keynote speech by the Founder of Second Life, Philip Rosedale, and interviews with other Linden Lab executives. Learn more at vwbpe.org

title: Isle of Anu Aquatic Life
desc: Isle of Anu Aquatic Life is an adult aquatic destination with merfolk themes, underwater spaces, and social hangouts. It serves as a gathering place for the Safe Water Foundation, with areas for swimming, relaxing, and connecting. Teleport pads lead to more spots across the region.
